ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the article */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "web_url" TEXT /* Web URL of the article */,
  "snippet" TEXT /* Snippet of the article */,
  "lead_paragraph" TEXT /* Lead paragraph of the article */,
  "print_page" INTEGER /* Page number in the print edition */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article */,
  "multimedia" TEXT /* Multimedia content associated with the article */,
  "headline_main" TEXT /* Main headline of the article */,
  "headline_kicker" TEXT /* Kicker headline of the article */,
  "headline_content_kicker" TEXT /* Content kicker headline of the article */,
  "headline_print_headline" TEXT /* Print headline of the article */,
  "headline_name" TEXT /* Name headline of the article */,
  "headline_seo" TEXT /* SEO headline of the article */,
  "headline_sub" TEXT /* Sub headline of the article */,
  "pub_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the article */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., article, review) */,
  "news_desk" TEXT /* News desk the article belongs to */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Section name where the article was published */,
  "byline_original" TEXT /* Original byline of the article */,
  "type_of_material" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., news, opinion) */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the article */,
  "uri" TEXT /* Unique URI of the article */,
  "print_section" TEXT /* Print section where the article was published */,
  "article_status" TEXT /* Current status of the article (e.g., published, draft, archived) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was last modified */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was created */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is featured */,
  "is_evergreen" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is evergreen */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the original source if the article was republished or syndicated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_section_name FOREIGN KEY ("section_name") REFERENCES sections ("section_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_news_desk FOREIGN KEY ("news_desk") REFERENCES news_desks ("news_desk_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_document_type FOREIGN KEY ("document_type") REFERENCES document_types ("document_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the keyword */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article the keyword is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Type of keyword (e.g., glocations, subject) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the keyword */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the keyword */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major status of the keyword */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the keyword was added */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the keyword was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the keyword is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multimedia" (
  "multimedia_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the multimedia asset */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article the multimedia asset is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the multimedia asset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the multimedia asset in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the multimedia asset (e.g., image, video) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the multimedia asset was uploaded */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the multimedia asset */,
  "credit" TEXT /* Credit information for the multimedia asset */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the multimedia asset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the multimedia asset was added */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the multimedia asset was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("multimedia_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multimedia_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, editor, researcher) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the article */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the article */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the section was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the section was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the section is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_desks" (
  "news_desk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news desk */,
  "news_desk_name" TEXT /* Name of the news desk */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the news desk */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the news desk was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the news desk was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the news desk is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_desk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "document_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the document type was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the document type was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "is_revertible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version can be reverted */,
  "reverted_from_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version from which this version was reverted */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
